---
title: "10 mýtů o danění vína"
date: 2024-04-17
description: "Fact-check debunking ten common myths about introducing an excise tax on still wine in the Czech Republic."
categories: [publication, second author, literature]
---

A fact-checking piece debunking ten common objections to introducing an excise tax on still wine in Czechia — from fears of smuggling to claims about harm to local producers. The argument for taxation rests on both public health and fiscal grounds. I found this project a useful exercise in communicating evidence clearly against entrenched misconceptions.

[Read the original study →](https://www.paqresearch.cz/post/10-mytu-o-daneni-vina-2/)
